question: 现在整体出租率怎么样？
expected_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(rented) / SUM(total) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate FROM (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented, COUNT(*) AS total FROM qft_whole_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 UNION ALL SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), COUNT(*) FROM qft_joint_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 UNION ALL SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), COUNT(*) FROM qft_focus_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0) t;
notes: 对应PM查询'当前的出租率、空置率是多少'。需跨三种业态汇总房间级出租情况

question: 翡翠城那边有多少套房子？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(cnt) AS total FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM qft_whole_housing wh JOIN qft_area_property ap ON wh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0 AND ap.property_adrr = '翡翠城小区' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_joint_housing jh JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE jh.company_id = 1001 AND jh.is_delete = 0 AND jh.is_check_out = 0 AND ap.property_adrr = '翡翠城小区' UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_focus_housing fh JOIN qft_area_property ap ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE fh.company_id = 1001 AND fh.is_delete = 0 AND fh.is_check_out = 0 AND ap.property_adrr = '翡翠城小区') t;
notes: 对应PM查询'华控有多少房子'，改为种子数据中的翡翠城小区

question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
expected_sql: SELECT jt.tenants_name, jh.door_number, jr.room_number, jt.lease_price FROM qft_joint_tenants jt JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jt.room_id = jr.id JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id WHERE jt.company_id = 1001 AND jt.is_delete = 0 AND jt.tenants_name = '张三';
expected_answer_description: 张三住在 2-1-101 的 A 室，月租 1200 元
notes: 对应PM查询'赵梓翔租了哪间房子'，改为种子数据中的张三

question: 刘洋手上管了几套房源？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(cnt) AS total FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM qft_whole_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0 AND salesman_id = 101 UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_joint_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0 AND salesman_id = 101) t;
expected_answer_description: 刘洋(user_id=101, salesman_id=101)签了整租2套(30003,30004)+合租0套=2套
notes: 对应PM查询'清姐签了多少房源'，改为种子数据中的管家刘洋

question: 2室1厅的整租有几套？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM qft_whole_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0 AND bedroom = 2 AND livingroom = 1;
notes: 对应PM查询'1室0厅的房子有多少间'，改为2室1厅

question: 合租空着的房间有多少？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS vacant_count FROM qft_joint_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_lease = 0;
expected_answer_description: 合租空置房间 18 间（总38间-已租20间）
notes: 对应PM查询'空置期50天以上的合租有多少间'，简化为空置数量

question: 整租那边欠房东多少钱还没付？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(arrear_money) AS total_arrear FROM qft_whole_bill_expend WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND arrear_money > 0;
notes: 对应PM查询'2月份应收多少？实收多少？'的整租应支版本

question: 合租租客这边一共欠了多少租金？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(debt_money) AS total_debt FROM qft_joint_tenants_income WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND debt_money > 0;
notes: 对应PM查询'2月份应收多少？实收多少？'的合租应收版本

question: 集中式现在签了多少个租客？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS tenant_count FROM qft_focus_tenants WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 集中式租客 5 个: 钱伟/孔丽/曾强/严芳/韩明
notes: 对应PM查询'集中式现在签了多少份合同'

question: 翡翠城2栋2-1-101租出去了没？
expected_sql: SELECT jh.door_number, jr.room_number, jr.is_lease, CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN '已出租' ELSE '空置' END AS status FROM qft_joint_housing jh JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.housing_id = jh.id JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE jh.company_id = 1001 AND jh.is_delete = 0 AND ap.property_adrr = '翡翠城小区' AND jh.door_number = '2-1-101';
expected_answer_description: 2-1-101 是合租房源60001, 有4间: A(已租)/B(已租)/C(空置)/D(空置)
notes: 对应PM查询'李堡新居有个0301租出去没'，改为翡翠城的门牌号

question: 有多少整租租客合同快到期了？三个月内的。
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS expiring_count FROM qft_whole_tenants WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND lease_endtime >= CURDATE() AND lease_endtime <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH);
expected_answer_description: 取决于查询时间，种子数据中到期时间从2025-01到2025-05不等
notes: 对应PM查询'这个月有多少房子待续约'

question: 集中式还有多少账单没收上来？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS unpaid_count, SUM(debt_money) AS total_debt FROM qft_focus_tenants_income WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND debt_money > 0;
expected_answer_description: 集中式未收账单: 钱伟1500+曾强800+韩明1600=3笔共3900元
notes: 对应PM查询'还有多少水费账单没缴纳'，改为集中式账单

question: 有多少房间还没做交割？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS unsigned_count FROM qft_focus_delivery_order WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND state = 0;
expected_answer_description: 未完成交割的有1条(严芳 state=0)
notes: 对应PM查询'还有多少房子没做租前审核'，改为交割检查

question: 3室以上的整租有几套？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM qft_whole_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0 AND bedroom >= 3;
notes: 对应PM查询'3室以上的整租有多少间'

question: 下个月有哪些合租租客合同到期？
expected_sql: SELECT jt.tenants_name, jt.phone, jt.lease_endtime, jh.door_number, jr.room_number FROM qft_joint_tenants jt JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jt.room_id = jr.id JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id WHERE jt.company_id = 1001 AND jt.is_delete = 0 AND jt.lease_endtime >= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 0 MONTH) AND jt.lease_endtime <= LAST_DAY(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) ORDER BY jt.lease_endtime;
expected_answer_description: 取决于查询时间，种子数据到期时间从2025-02到2025-06不等
notes: 对应PM查询'下个月有多少租客合同到期'

question: 我们一共有几个门店？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS store_count FROM qft_store WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 3 个门店: 城东/城西/城北
notes: 最基础的门店数量查询

question: 张三那小子交租了没？欠多少？
expected_sql: SELECT t.tenants_name, SUM(i.debt_money) AS total_debt FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id WHERE i.company_id = 1001 AND i.is_delete = 0 AND t.tenants_name = '张三' AND t.is_delete = 0 AND i.debt_money > 0 GROUP BY t.tenants_name;
expected_answer_description: 张三第3期账单(95003)欠1600元
notes: 对应PM查询中的欠费查询，口语化表达

question: 我们公司管了几个小区？分别叫啥？
expected_sql: SELECT property_adrr AS community_name FROM qft_area_property WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 5个小区: 翡翠城小区/锦绣花园/金沙世纪城/光华逸家/北城天街花园
notes: 基础物业地址查询

question: 电子合同一共签了多少份？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS contract_count FROM qft_electronics_contract WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 电子合同共15份
notes: 原Q08的改进版

question: 智能门锁装了几个？有没有离线的？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_locks, SUM(CASE WHEN online_state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS online_count, SUM(CASE WHEN online_state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offline_count FROM qft_smart_device WHERE device_type = 1 AND is_delete = 0;
notes: 对应PM查询智能硬件相关，device_type=1为门锁

question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
expected_sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS income, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS expense FROM qft_finance WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month;
expected_answer_description: 按月统计收支走势，2024-02到2024-07各月收入支出金额
notes: 对应PM查询'分析下近半年的应收、实收走势'

question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
expected_sql: SELECT ap.property_adrr AS community, COUNT(*) AS total_rooms, SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate FROM qft_joint_room jr JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND jr.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY ap.property_adrr ORDER BY occupancy_rate DESC;
expected_answer_description: 按小区维度计算合租出租率排名，出租率高的好租、低的不好租
notes: 对应PM查询'按照物业分析下哪里的房源好租'

question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, COUNT(*) AS total_rooms, SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate FROM qft_joint_room jr JOIN qft_store s ON jr.store_id = s.id WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND jr.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY occupancy_rate DESC;
expected_answer_description: 按门店计算合租出租率: 城北门店(60008-60010)出租率最高
notes: 对应PM查询'分析下哪个店铺的出租率最好'

question: 整租的账单近6个月收上来多少钱？
expected_sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(valid_start_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(real_money) AS collected FROM qft_whole_bill_expend WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND valid_start_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(valid_start_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month;
expected_answer_description: 按月统计整租应支账单的实收金额
notes: 对应PM查询'分析下6个月来整租的房租账单收上来多少钱'

question: 成都三个门店的应收和实收分别是多少？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, SUM(b.total_trade_money) AS total_receivable, SUM(b.total_real_money) AS total_received, SUM(b.total_debt_money) AS total_outstanding FROM qft_bill b JOIN qft_store s ON b.store_id = s.id WHERE b.company_id = 1001 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND b.trade_type = 1 GROUP BY s.name;
expected_answer_description: 按门店统计账单的应收和实收金额
notes: 对应PM查询'分析下这个月成都各个店铺的应收实收'

question: 每个门店整租和合租各有多少套房源？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, IFNULL(w.whole_count, 0) AS whole_count, IFNULL(j.joint_count, 0) AS joint_count FROM qft_store s LEFT JOIN (SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS whole_count FROM qft_whole_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0 GROUP BY store_id) w ON s.id = w.store_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS joint_count FROM qft_joint_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0 GROUP BY store_id) j ON s.id = j.store_id WHERE s.company_id = 1001 AND s.is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 城东: 整租4+合租4, 城西: 整租4+合租3, 城北: 整租2+合租3
notes: 按门店和业态分组统计

question: 每个门店的维修单情况怎么样？哪个最多？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, COUNT(*) AS repair_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rr.repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN rr.repair_status != 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending FROM qft_room_repair rr JOIN qft_store s ON rr.store_id = s.id WHERE rr.company_id = 1001 AND rr.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY repair_count DESC;
expected_answer_description: 城东2单(2已完成), 城西2单(1待处理+1维修中), 城北1单(1已完成)
notes: 维修工单的门店分布分析

question: 整租的收房价和出房价差价多少？哪套赚得最多？
expected_sql: SELECT wh.house_code, wh.door_number, wh.joe_price AS landlord_price, wr.pricing_money AS tenant_price, (wr.pricing_money - wh.joe_price) AS profit FROM qft_whole_housing wh JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.housing_id = wh.id WHERE wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0 AND wr.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY profit DESC;
notes: 对应PM查询收房价出房价比较

question: 智能电表的充值记录统计一下，谁充的最多？
expected_sql: SELECT ft.name AS tenant_name, COUNT(*) AS recharge_count, SUM(r.recharge_amount) AS total_amount FROM qft_smart_electricity_meter_recharge_record r JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft ON r.tenant_id = ft.id WHERE r.company_id = 1001 AND r.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY ft.name ORDER BY total_amount DESC;
expected_answer_description: 钱伟充值最多(430元/4次), 严芳230元/3次, 韩明260元/2次, 孔丽300元/3次
notes: 智能硬件域的分析查询

question: 哪些合租租客有欠费？按欠费金额排个序。
expected_sql: SELECT t.tenants_name, t.phone, SUM(i.debt_money) AS total_debt FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id WHERE i.company_id = 1001 AND i.is_delete = 0 AND i.debt_money > 0 AND t.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY t.tenants_name, t.phone ORDER BY total_debt DESC;
notes: 欠费排名分析

question: 装修花了多少钱？按小区统计一下。
expected_sql: SELECT ap.property_adrr AS community, SUM(rr.renovation_cost) AS total_cost FROM qft_rm_renovation_record rr JOIN qft_area_property ap ON rr.property_adrr_id = ap.id WHERE rr.company_id = 1001 AND rr.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY ap.property_adrr ORDER BY total_cost DESC;
expected_answer_description: 翡翠城15000, 金沙世纪城33000, 北城天街花园44000
notes: 装修成本按小区统计分析

question: 每个门店收了多少钱、付了多少钱？利润怎么样？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS income, SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS expense, SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS profit FROM qft_finance f JOIN qft_store s ON f.store_id = s.id WHERE f.company_id = 1001 AND f.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY profit DESC;
expected_answer_description: 按门店统计收入/支出/利润
notes: 对应PM查询'分析下这个月北京各个店铺的应收实收'

question: 退房的租客都是什么原因退的？有没有违约的？
expected_sql: SELECT check_out_reason, check_out_type, CASE WHEN check_out_type = 1 THEN '正常退房' WHEN check_out_type = 2 THEN '提前退房' WHEN check_out_type = 3 THEN '违约退房' END AS type_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM qft_tenants_check_out WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 GROUP BY check_out_reason, check_out_type;
expected_answer_description: 3条退房: 工作调动(正常)/合同到期(正常)/个人原因违约退房(违约) 违约1个
notes: 退房原因分析

question: 总收入和总支出是多少？我们赚钱了还是亏钱了？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expense, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS net_profit FROM qft_finance WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 总收入24400, 总支出10800, 净利润13600, 赚钱了
notes: 盈亏分析

question: 整租和合租对比一下，谁更赚钱？
expected_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN house_code LIKE 'ZZ%' THEN '整租' WHEN house_code LIKE 'HZ%' THEN '合租' ELSE '其他' END AS business_type, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS income, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS expense, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS profit FROM qft_finance WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 GROUP BY CASE WHEN house_code LIKE 'ZZ%' THEN '整租' WHEN house_code LIKE 'HZ%' THEN '合租' ELSE '其他' END;
expected_answer_description: 整租收入vs支出利润对比合租收入vs支出利润
notes: 对应PM查询'对比一下整租和合租两种业态哪种更赚钱'

question: 帮我看看哪个门店综合表现最差，我考虑关掉它。从出租率、收入、欠费几个角度分析一下。
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 各门店合租出租率 2) 各门店财务收支 3) 各门店欠费总额, 综合打分
expected_answer_description: 从出租率/收入/欠费三维度评估三个门店，找出最差的门店
notes: 对应PM查询'我准备关掉一个最差的门店，帮我做个关店影响评估'

question: 有没有租客是逾期后才交的钱？
expected_sql: SELECT t.tenants_name, i.collection_date, i.real_pay_date, DATEDIFF(i.real_pay_date, i.collection_date) AS overdue_days FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id WHERE i.company_id = 1001 AND i.is_delete = 0 AND i.real_pay_date IS NOT NULL AND i.real_pay_date > i.collection_date;
expected_answer_description: 找出实际付款日期晚于应收日期的记录
notes: 对应PM查询'过去一年有多少租客是逾期后才付款的'

question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 出租率 2) 收入规模 3) 欠费率 4) 维修完成率, 加权计算健康度评分
expected_answer_description: 综合4个维度给每个门店打分，找出最需要关注的门店
notes: 对应PM查询'帮我给所有门店做一个健康度评分'

question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 各小区装修投入 2) 各小区租金收入 3) 计算回报率和回本周期
expected_answer_description: 按小区对比装修成本和已收租金，计算投资回报
notes: 对应PM查询'帮我算一下每个小区的投资回报周期'

question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 各门店近期新签租客数 2) 各门店总租客数 3) 新签比例分析
expected_answer_description: 分析各门店新签/存量租客比例，新签少说明在吃老本
notes: 对应PM查询'有没有哪个店是在吃老本的'

question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 各业态出租率 2) 回款率(实收/应收) 3) 空置率 4) 综合评分
expected_answer_description: 从出租率、回款率、空置率等多维度综合评估业务健康状况
notes: 对应PM查询'评价下当前业务的健康度'

question: 城东门店合租的欠费租客有谁？欠的是哪间房？
expected_sql: SELECT t.tenants_name, t.phone, jh.door_number, jr.room_number, SUM(i.debt_money) AS total_debt FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON i.room_id = jr.id JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON i.housing_id = jh.id WHERE i.company_id = 1001 AND i.is_delete = 0 AND i.store_id = 10001 AND i.debt_money > 0 AND t.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY t.tenants_name, t.phone, jh.door_number, jr.room_number;
notes: 跨多表的精确欠费定位

question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？
expected_sql: SELECT wh.house_code, wh.door_number, ap.property_adrr, wh.hosting_create_time, wh.hosting_end_time, wh.contract_year, wh.contract_month, DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, CURDATE()) AS remaining_days FROM qft_whole_housing wh JOIN qft_area_property ap ON wh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0 ORDER BY wh.hosting_end_time ASC;
expected_answer_description: 列出所有整租房源的托管期限和剩余天数，最早到期的在前
notes: 托管合同到期分析

question: 集中式和合租哪个更划算？从投入和收益两方面分析。
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 集中式收入vs支出 2) 合租收入vs支出 3) 单位面积回报比较
expected_answer_description: 对比集中式和合租两种模式的收支效率和投资回报
notes: 业态对比分析

question: 门锁最近的开门记录有啥异常吗？有没有凌晨被打开的？
expected_sql: SELECT lock_id, open_name, open_phone, open_door_time, type, CASE WHEN type = '0' THEN '密码开门' WHEN type = '1' THEN '临时密码' WHEN type = '2' THEN '机械钥匙' END AS open_type FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record WHERE company_id = 1001 AND (HOUR(open_door_time) >= 23 OR HOUR(open_door_time) <= 5) ORDER BY open_door_time;
expected_answer_description: 凌晨/深夜开门: LOCK-002在22:30被机械钥匙开门, LOCK-003在22:00被机械钥匙开门, LOCK-003在21:30被临时密码开门
notes: 智能硬件异常行为分析

question: 每个员工负责了多少事务？谁最忙？
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 各员工管理房源数(salesman_id) 2) 各员工处理维修单数 3) 各员工负责装修数 综合
expected_answer_description: 统计每个员工(张伟/刘洋/王芳/陈杰/赵敏)的综合工作量
notes: 员工工作量分析

question: 合租每间房的均价是多少？哪间最贵哪间最便宜？
expected_sql: SELECT AVG(pricing_money) AS avg_price, MAX(pricing_money) AS max_price, MIN(pricing_money) AS min_price FROM qft_joint_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 合租房间均价统计，最贵的是70008(A室1400元)，最便宜是70038(E室700元)
notes: 合租房间价格分析

question: 如果把所有欠费都收回来，能多收多少钱？占总应收的比例是多少？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(total_debt) AS all_debt, SUM(total_receivable) AS all_receivable, ROUND(SUM(total_debt) / SUM(total_receivable) * 100, 2) AS debt_ratio FROM (SELECT SUM(arrear_money) AS total_debt, SUM(pay_money) AS total_receivable FROM qft_whole_bill_expend WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 UNION ALL SELECT SUM(debt_money), SUM(pay_money) FROM qft_joint_tenants_income WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 UNION ALL SELECT SUM(debt_money), SUM(pay_money) FROM qft_focus_tenants_income WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0) t;
expected_answer_description: 整租欠26400+合租欠8750+集中式欠3900=总欠39050, 占总应收比例
notes: 全业态欠费综合分析

question: 帮我做个经营简报：房源总量、租客总量、出租率、本期收入、欠费总额。
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 各业态房源数 2) 各业态租客数 3) 各业态出租率 4) 财务收入 5) 三种欠费汇总
notes: 综合经营数据仪表盘

question: 如果要优化运营，你觉得最该关注哪些问题？从数据角度给我分析分析。
expected_sql: 需要多步查询: 1) 空置率最高的区域 2) 欠费最严重的租客/门店 3) 未完成维修 4) 收支失衡门店, 综合分析给出建议
expected_answer_description: 关注点: 1)合租空置率高(47%) 2)整租欠房东26400待追 3)邓宇航欠4200最多 4)维修有待处理单 5)门锁有离线
notes: 数据驱动的运营建议
